  sourceDataChangedAt   DateTime?                                // 元データが変更された日時
  latestCalculatedAmount Int?                                    // 最新の元データで計算した金額

  note                String?                                    // 備考
  createdAt           DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt           DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt           DateTime?                                  // 論理削除日時

  // Relations
  agent                StpAgent                  @relation(fields: [agentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  stpCompany           StpCompany?               @relation(fields: [stpCompanyId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  agentContractHistory StpAgentContractHistory?  @relation(fields: [agentContractHistoryId], references: [id])
  contractHistory      StpContractHistory?       @relation(fields: [contractHistoryId], references: [id])
  revenueRecord        StpRevenueRecord?         @relation(fields: [revenueRecordId], references: [id])
  invoice              StpInvoice?               @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id])
  editLogs             StpFinanceEditLog[]       @relation("ExpenseEditLogs")
  lineItems            StpInvoiceLineItem[]
  paymentAllocations   StpPaymentAllocation[]
  accountingReconciliations AccountingReconciliation[] @relation("ExpenseReconciliation")

  @@index([agentId])
  @@index([stpCompanyId])
  @@index([targetMonth])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([agentId, targetMonth])
  @@index([accountingStatus])
  @@index([invoiceId])
  @@map("stp_expense_records")
}

// ============================================
// 請求書管理 (STP Invoices)
// 自社発行請求書・先方受領請求書を統一管理
// ============================================

model StpInvoice {
  id                  Int       @id @default(autoincrement())

  // 種別: outgoing（自社発行）/ incoming（先方受領）
  direction           String    @db.VarChar(20)

  // 関連先
  stpCompanyId        Int?                                        // 顧客企業
  agentId             Int?                                        // 代理店

  // 適格請求書（インボイス制度）対応
  invoiceType         String    @default("standard") @db.VarChar(20) // "standard"（通常）/ "credit_note"（赤伝）
  originalInvoiceId   Int?                                        // 赤伝の場合、元の請求書ID
  registrationNumber  String?   @db.VarChar(20)                   // 適格請求書発行事業者登録番号（発行時スナップショット）

  // 請求書情報
  invoiceNumber       String?   @db.VarChar(50)                   // 請求書番号（自動採番: INV-YYYYMM-NNNN）
  invoiceDate         DateTime? @db.Date                          // 請求日
  dueDate             DateTime? @db.Date                          // 支払期限
  totalAmount         Int?                                        // 請求金額（税込）
  taxAmount           Int?                                        // 消費税額

  // 税率ごとの合計（インボイス制度対応）
  subtotalByTaxRate   Json?                                       // {"10":{"subtotal":100000,"tax":10000},"8":{"subtotal":50000,"tax":4000}}

  // 源泉徴収（incoming請求書用）
  withholdingTaxAmount Int?                                       // 源泉徴収税額
  netPaymentAmount    Int?                                        // 差引支払額（totalAmount - withholdingTaxAmount）

  // ステータス
  // outgoing: draft → issued → sent → paid
  // incoming: received → approved → paid
  status              String    @default("draft") @db.VarChar(20)

  // ファイル管理
  filePath            String?                                     // 保存ファイルパス
  fileName            String?   @db.VarChar(200)                  // 元ファイル名

  // テンプレート（将来用: PDF自動生成）
  templateId          String?   @db.VarChar(50)                   // 使用テンプレートID
  templateData        Json?                                       // テンプレート埋め込みデータ

  note                String?
  deletedAt           DateTime?
  createdAt           DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt           DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations（1:N - 1つの請求書に複数の売上/経費レコードを紐づけ可能）
  stpCompany       StpCompany?          @relation(fields: [stpCompanyId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  agent            StpAgent?            @relation(fields: [agentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  originalInvoice  StpInvoice?          @relation("CreditNoteRelation", fields: [originalInvoiceId], references: [id])
  creditNotes      StpInvoice[]         @relation("CreditNoteRelation")
  revenueRecords   StpRevenueRecord[]
  expenseRecords   StpExpenseRecord[]
  lineItems        StpInvoiceLineItem[]

  @@index([direction])
  @@index([stpCompanyId])
  @@index([agentId])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("stp_invoices")
}

// ============================================
// 売上・経費 編集ログ (STP Finance Edit Logs)
// 自動生成レコードの重要フィールド編集や金額不一致を記録
// ============================================

model StpFinanceEditLog {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())

  // 対象レコード（どちらか一方）
  revenueRecordId   Int?
  expenseRecordId   Int?

  // 編集内容
  editType          String    @db.VarChar(30)   // "field_change"（重要フィールド変更）/ "amount_mismatch"（金額不一致）
  fieldName         String?   @db.VarChar(50)   // 変更されたフィールド名
  oldValue          String?                     // 変更前の値
  newValue          String?                     // 変更後の値
  reason            String?                     // 変更理由（ユーザー入力）

  // 編集者
  editedBy          Int?                        // 編集者（MasterStaffへの外部キー）

  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  revenueRecord     StpRevenueRecord? @relation("RevenueEditLogs", fields: [revenueRecordId], references: [id])
  expenseRecord     StpExpenseRecord? @relation("ExpenseEditLogs", fields: [expenseRecordId], references: [id])
  editor            MasterStaff?      @relation(fields: [editedBy], references: [id])

  @@index([revenueRecordId])
  @@index([expenseRecordId])
  @@map("stp_finance_edit_logs")
}


// ============================================
// 請求書明細行 (STP Invoice Line Items)
// インボイス制度対応の明細管理 + 税率ごと端数処理
// ============================================

model StpInvoiceLineItem {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  invoiceId         Int                                             // StpInvoiceへの外部キー
  sortOrder         Int       @default(0)                           // 表示順

  // 明細内容
  description       String    @db.VarChar(500)                      // 品目・サービス名
  quantity          Int       @default(1)                           // 数量
  unitPrice         Int                                             // 単価（税抜）
  amount            Int                                             // 小計（税抜）= quantity * unitPrice

  // 税情報（明細行レベル）
  taxRate           Int       @default(10)                          // 適用税率(%)
  taxRateCategory   String    @default("standard") @db.VarChar(20) // "standard"(10%), "reduced"(8%), "exempt"(0%)

  // 紐づけ（売上/経費レコードへの参照。nullの場合は手入力明細）
  revenueRecordId   Int?
  expenseRecordId   Int?

  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  invoice           StpInvoice        @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  revenueRecord     StpRevenueRecord? @relation(fields: [revenueRecordId], references: [id])
  expenseRecord     StpExpenseRecord? @relation(fields: [expenseRecordId], references: [id])

  @@index([invoiceId])
  @@map("stp_invoice_line_items")
}

// ============================================
// 入出金履歴 (STP Payment Transactions)
// 経理担当者が管理する実際の銀行取引記録
// ============================================

model StpPaymentTransaction {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())

  // 取引区分
  direction             String    @db.VarChar(20)                    // "incoming"（入金）/ "outgoing"（出金）

  // 取引情報
  transactionDate       DateTime  @db.Date                           // 取引日
  amount                Int                                          // 取引金額
  counterpartyName      String?   @db.VarChar(200)                   // 取引先名（銀行明細の振込名義人等）
  bankAccountName       String?   @db.VarChar(100)                   // 自社の口座名

  // 勘定科目（経理担当者が入力、将来freee連携用）
  accountCode           String?   @db.VarChar(20)                    // 勘定科目コード
  accountName           String?   @db.VarChar(100)                   // 勘定科目名
  subAccountCode        String?   @db.VarChar(20)                    // 補助科目コード
  subAccountName        String?   @db.VarChar(100)                   // 補助科目名

  // freee連携用予約フィールド
  freeeTransactionId    String?   @db.VarChar(100)                   // freee取引ID
  freeeDealId           String?   @db.VarChar(100)                   // freee取引（税区分含む）ID
  freeeSyncedAt         DateTime?                                     // freee同期日時

  // 源泉徴収
  withholdingTaxAmount  Int?                                          // 源泉徴収税額（経費支払時）

  // 消込ステータス
  status                String    @default("unmatched") @db.VarChar(20) // unmatched/partial/matched/excluded

  // 操作者
  processedBy           Int?                                          // 処理者（MasterStaffへの外部キー）

  note                  String?
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  processor             MasterStaff?              @relation(fields: [processedBy], references: [id])
  allocations           StpPaymentAllocation[]

  @@index([direction])
  @@index([transactionDate])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([transactionDate, direction])
  @@map("stp_payment_transactions")
}

// ============================================
// 入出金配分 (STP Payment Allocations)
// 入出金履歴と売上/経費レコードのN:N消込マッピング
// ============================================

model StpPaymentAllocation {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  paymentTransactionId  Int                                          // 入出金履歴への外部キー

  // 配分先（どちらか一方）
  revenueRecordId       Int?                                         // 売上レコードへの外部キー
  expenseRecordId       Int?                                         // 経費レコードへの外部キー

  // 配分金額
  allocatedAmount       Int                                          // この配分で消し込む金額

  note                  String?
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  paymentTransaction    StpPaymentTransaction @relation(fields: [paymentTransactionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  revenueRecord         StpRevenueRecord?     @relation(fields: [revenueRecordId], references: [id])
  expenseRecord         StpExpenseRecord?     @relation(fields: [expenseRecordId], references: [id])

  @@index([paymentTransactionId])
  @@index([revenueRecordId])
  @@index([expenseRecordId])
  @@map("stp_payment_allocations")
}

// ============================================
// 月次締めロック (STP Monthly Closes)
// 過去月のデータ変更を防止する月次締め機能
// ============================================

model StpMonthlyClose {
  id              Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  targetMonth     DateTime  @db.Date                              // 締め対象月（月初日で統一: 2026-02-01等）
  closedAt        DateTime  @default(now())                       // 締め実行日時
  closedBy        Int                                              // 締め実行者（MasterStaffへの外部キー）
  reopenedAt      DateTime?                                        // 再オープン日時（null = ロック中）
  reopenedBy      Int?                                             // 再オープン者
  reopenReason    String?                                          // 再オープン理由
  note            String?
  snapshotData    Json?     // クローズ時のPLスナップショット（経理システム追加）

  // Relations
  closer          MasterStaff  @relation("MonthCloser", fields: [closedBy], references: [id])
  reopener        MasterStaff? @relation("MonthReopener", fields: [reopenedBy], references: [id])

  @@unique([targetMonth])
  @@map("stp_monthly_closes")
}

// ============================================
// 請求書番号採番カウンター (STP Invoice Number Sequences)
// INV-YYYYMM-NNNN形式の自動採番を安全に管理
// ============================================

model StpInvoiceNumberSequence {
  id                 Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  operatingCompanyId Int?      // FK → OperatingCompany（経理システム追加）
  yearMonth          String    @db.VarChar(7)                // "2026-02" 形式
  lastNumber         Int       @default(0)                   // その月の最後の番号
  updatedAt          DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  operatingCompany   OperatingCompany? @relation(fields: [operatingCompanyId], references: [id])

  @@unique([operatingCompanyId, yearMonth])
  @@map("stp_invoice_number_sequences")
}

// ============================================
// 会計取込バッチ (Accounting Import Batches)
// freee/銀行CSVの取込履歴を管理
// ============================================

model AccountingImportBatch {
  id              Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  source          String    @db.VarChar(20)                      // "freee" / "bank_csv" / "manual"
  sourceService   String?   @db.VarChar(30)                      // "freee", "mufg", "smbc" 等
  fileName        String?   @db.VarChar(500)                     // 取込ファイル名
  periodFrom      DateTime? @db.Date                             // 対象期間（開始）
  periodTo        DateTime? @db.Date                             // 対象期間（終了）
  totalCount      Int       @default(0)                          // 総件数
  newCount        Int       @default(0)                          // 新規取込件数
  duplicateCount  Int       @default(0)                          // 重複スキップ件数
  status          String    @default("processing") @db.VarChar(20) // processing/completed/error
  errorMessage    String?                                        // エラー時の内容
  importedBy      Int                                            // 取込実行者（MasterStaffへの外部キー）
  importedAt      DateTime  @default(now())                      // 取込日時
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  importer        MasterStaff              @relation(fields: [importedBy], references: [id])
  transactions    AccountingTransaction[]

  @@index([source])
  @@index([importedAt])
  @@map("accounting_import_batches")
}

// ============================================
// 会計取引 (Accounting Transactions)
// freee・銀行の入出金データ（実際のお金の動き）
// ============================================

model AccountingTransaction {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  direction             String    @db.VarChar(10)                  // "incoming"（入金）/ "outgoing"（出金）
  transactionDate       DateTime  @db.Date                         // 取引日
  valueDate             DateTime? @db.Date                         // 決済日・受渡日
  amount                Int                                        // 金額（税込）
  taxAmount             Int?                                       // 消費税額
  counterpartyName      String    @db.VarChar(200)                 // 取引先名（freee/銀行の表記）
  counterpartyCode      String?   @db.VarChar(50)                  // 取引先コード（freee上の管理コード）
  description           String?                                    // 摘要（銀行明細の摘要欄）
  memo                  String?                                    // 社内メモ
  accountCode           String?   @db.VarChar(20)                  // 勘定科目コード
  accountName           String?   @db.VarChar(100)                 // 勘定科目名
  bankAccountName       String?   @db.VarChar(100)                 // 口座名（みずほ普通、UFJ当座 等）

  // データ元
  source                String    @db.VarChar(20)                  // "freee" / "bank_csv" / "manual"
  sourceService         String?   @db.VarChar(30)                  // 具体的なサービス名
  sourceTransactionId   String?   @db.VarChar(100)                 // 外部システムの取引ID
  sourceDealId          String?   @db.VarChar(100)                 // freeeの取引(deal)ID
  importBatchId         Int?                                       // 取込バッチID

  // 消込ステータス
  reconciliationStatus  String    @default("unmatched") @db.VarChar(20) // unmatched/partial/matched/excluded

  // プロジェクト紐付け（判明している場合）
  projectId             Int?                                       // MasterProjectへの外部キー

  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  importBatch           AccountingImportBatch?   @relation(fields: [importBatchId], references: [id])
  project               MasterProject?           @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  reconciliations       AccountingReconciliation[]
  verifications         AccountingVerification[]

  @@index([direction])
  @@index([transactionDate])
  @@index([counterpartyName])
  @@index([reconciliationStatus])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([source])
  @@index([sourceTransactionId])
  @@map("accounting_transactions")
}

// ============================================
// 会計消込・照合 (Accounting Reconciliations)
// 会計取引とプロジェクト側レコードのN:N紐付け
// ============================================

model AccountingReconciliation {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  transactionId         Int                                        // AccountingTransactionへの外部キー
  projectId             Int                                        // master_projectsへの外部キー
  recordType            String    @db.VarChar(20)                  // "revenue" / "expense"
  revenueRecordId       Int?                                       // StpRevenueRecordへの外部キー（売上の場合）
  expenseRecordId       Int?                                       // StpExpenseRecordへの外部キー（経費の場合）
  allocatedAmount       Int                                        // この紐付けで消し込む金額
  note                  String?                                    // 消込時の備考
  matchMethod           String    @default("manual") @db.VarChar(10) // "auto"（自動照合）/ "manual"（手動）
  matchedBy             Int?                                       // 消込実行者（MasterStaffへの外部キー）
  matchedAt             DateTime  @default(now())                  // 消込日時
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  transaction           AccountingTransaction  @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  project               MasterProject          @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  revenueRecord         StpRevenueRecord?      @relation("RevenueReconciliation", fields: [revenueRecordId], references: [id])
  expenseRecord         StpExpenseRecord?       @relation("ExpenseReconciliation", fields: [expenseRecordId], references: [id])
  matcher               MasterStaff?           @relation("ReconciliationMatcher", fields: [matchedBy], references: [id])

  @@index([transactionId])
  @@index([revenueRecordId])
  @@index([expenseRecordId])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@map("accounting_reconciliations")
}

// ============================================
// 会計確認 (Accounting Verifications)
// プロジェクト担当と経理のダブルチェック記録
// ============================================

model AccountingVerification {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  transactionId         Int                                        // AccountingTransactionへの外部キー
  verificationType      String    @db.VarChar(20)                  // "project"（業務発生確認）/ "accounting"（経理確認）
  status                String    @default("pending") @db.VarChar(20) // pending/verified/flagged
  verifiedBy            Int                                        // 確認者（MasterStaffへの外部キー）
  verifiedAt            DateTime?                                  // 確認日時（null = 未確認）
  flagReason            String?                                    // 問題ありの場合の理由
  note                  String?                                    // 確認メモ
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  transaction           AccountingTransaction  @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  verifier              MasterStaff            @relation(fields: [verifiedBy], references: [id])

  @@unique([transactionId, verificationType])
  @@index([verificationType])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([verifiedBy])
  @@map("accounting_verifications")
}

// ============================================
// 会計月次締め (Accounting Monthly Closes)
// プロジェクト横断の月次締め管理
// プロジェクト側の締め確認後、経理が最終締めを行う
// ============================================

model AccountingMonthlyClose {
  id              Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  targetMonth     DateTime  @db.Date                              // 締め対象月（月初日で統一: 2026-02-01等）
  projectId       Int                                              // プロジェクトID（MasterProjectへの外部キー）
  status          String    @default("open") @db.VarChar(20)      // open/project_closed/accounting_closed
  projectClosedAt   DateTime?                                      // プロジェクト側締め日時
  projectClosedBy   Int?                                           // プロジェクト側締め実行者
  accountingClosedAt DateTime?                                     // 経理側最終締め日時
  accountingClosedBy Int?                                          // 経理側最終締め実行者
  reopenedAt      DateTime?                                        // 再オープン日時
  reopenedBy      Int?                                             // 再オープン者
  reopenReason    String?                                          // 再オープン理由
  note            String?
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  project            MasterProject @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  projectCloser      MasterStaff?  @relation("AcctMonthProjectCloser", fields: [projectClosedBy], references: [id])
  accountingCloser   MasterStaff?  @relation("AcctMonthAcctCloser", fields: [accountingClosedBy], references: [id])
  reopener           MasterStaff?  @relation("AcctMonthReopener", fields: [reopenedBy], references: [id])

  @@unique([targetMonth, projectId])
  @@index([targetMonth])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("accounting_monthly_closes")
}

// ============================================
// 役割種別 × プロジェクト 中間テーブル
// ============================================

model StaffRoleTypeProject {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  roleTypeId Int      @map("role_type_id")
  projectId  Int      @map("project_id")
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  roleType StaffRoleType @relation(fields: [roleTypeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  project  MasterProject @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([roleTypeId, projectId])
  @@map("staff_role_type_projects")
}

// ============================================
// 担当者フィールド制約 (Staff Field Restrictions)
// フィールドごとにプロジェクト・役割で担当者を絞り込む
// ============================================

model StaffFieldRestriction {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  fieldCode  String   @db.VarChar(50) @map("field_code")
  projectId  Int?     @map("project_id")
  roleTypeId Int?     @map("role_type_id")
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  project  MasterProject? @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  roleType StaffRoleType? @relation(fields: [roleTypeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([fieldCode, projectId, roleTypeId])
  @@map("staff_field_restrictions")
}

// ============================================
// フィールド変更履歴 (Field Change Logs)
// 汎用的なフィールド変更記録テーブル
// ============================================

model FieldChangeLog {
  id          Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  entityType  String   @db.VarChar(50)                    // "stp_company", "stp_agent", "stp_contract_history"
  entityId    Int                                          // 対象レコードのID
  fieldName   String   @db.VarChar(50)                    // "salesStaffId", "adminStaffId" 等
  displayName String   @db.VarChar(100)                   // "担当営業", "担当事務" 等（UI表示用）
  oldValue    String?                                      // 変更前の値
  newValue    String?                                      // 変更後の値
  note        String                                       // 変更理由メモ（必須）
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([entityType, entityId])
  @@map("field_change_logs")
}

// ============================================
// STP設定 (STP Settings)
// key-value形式でダッシュボード設定等を保存
// ============================================

model StpSetting {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  key       String   @unique @db.VarChar(100)        // 設定キー（例: "annual_revenue_target"）
  value     String                                    // 設定値（JSON or テキスト）
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("stp_settings")
}

// ============================================
// ============================================
// 経理・財務管理システム テーブル（SPEC-ACCOUNTING-001）
// ============================================
// ============================================

// ============================================
// ① Transaction（取引）
// ============================================

model Transaction {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  invoiceGroupId        Int?      // FK → InvoiceGroup（売上側の請求グループ）
  paymentGroupId        Int?      // FK → PaymentGroup（経費側の支払グループ）
  counterpartyId        Int       // FK → Counterparty（取引先）
  contractId            Int?      // FK → MasterContract（CRM契約に紐づく場合）
  recurringTransactionId Int?     // FK → RecurringTransaction（定期取引から生成された場合）
  allocationTemplateId  Int?      // FK → AllocationTemplate（按分ありの場合）
  costCenterId          Int?      // FK → CostCenter（按分なしの場合のプロジェクト）
  expenseCategoryId     Int       // FK → ExpenseCategory（費目）
  projectId             Int?      // FK → MasterProject（どのプロジェクトで作成されたか）

  type                  String    // "revenue" | "expense"
  amount                Int       // 金額（税抜）
  taxAmount             Int       // 消費税額
  taxRate               Int       @default(10) // 税率（%）
  taxType               String    @default("tax_excluded") // "tax_included" | "tax_excluded"

  periodFrom            DateTime  // 発生期間From
  periodTo              DateTime  // 発生期間To
  paymentDueDate        DateTime? // 支払期日
  scheduledPaymentDate  DateTime? // 入金/支払予定日
  paymentMethodId       Int?      // FK → PaymentMethod（決済手段）

  status                String    @default("unconfirmed")
  // "unconfirmed" | "confirmed" | "awaiting_accounting" |
  // "returned" | "resubmitted" | "journalized" |
  // "partially_paid" | "paid" | "hidden"

  note                  String?   // 摘要・メモ

  // 自動生成トラッキング
  isAutoGenerated       Boolean   @default(false)
  sourceType            String?   // "crm" | "recurring" | "manual" | "slack"
  sourceDataChangedAt   DateTime? // ソースデータ変更日時
  latestCalculatedAmount Int?     // 最新の計算金額（ソース変更時）

  // STP固有（移行用）
  stpRevenueType        String?   // "initial" | "monthly" | "performance"
  stpExpenseType        String?   // "agent_initial" | "agent_monthly" | "commission_initial" etc.
  stpCandidateId        Int?      // FK → StpCandidate（成果報酬の場合）
  stpContractHistoryId  Int?      // FK → StpContractHistory
  stpAgentId            Int?      // FK → StpAgent

  // 源泉徴収（経費の場合）
  isWithholdingTarget   Boolean   @default(false)
  withholdingTaxRate    Decimal?
  withholdingTaxAmount  Int?
  netPaymentAmount      Int?

  confirmedBy           Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  confirmedAt           DateTime?

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  invoiceGroup          InvoiceGroup?         @relation(fields: [invoiceGroupId], references: [id])
  paymentGroup          PaymentGroup?         @relation(fields: [paymentGroupId], references: [id])
  counterparty          Counterparty          @relation(fields: [counterpartyId], references: [id])
  contract              MasterContract?       @relation(fields: [contractId], references: [id])
  recurringTransaction  RecurringTransaction? @relation(fields: [recurringTransactionId], references: [id])
  allocationTemplate    AllocationTemplate?   @relation(fields: [allocationTemplateId], references: [id])
  costCenter            CostCenter?           @relation(fields: [costCenterId], references: [id])
  expenseCategory       ExpenseCategory       @relation(fields: [expenseCategoryId], references: [id])
  project               MasterProject?        @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  paymentMethod         PaymentMethod?        @relation(fields: [paymentMethodId], references: [id])
  confirmer             MasterStaff?          @relation("TransactionConfirmer", fields: [confirmedBy], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff           @relation("TransactionCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?          @relation("TransactionUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
  journalEntries        JournalEntry[]
  comments              TransactionComment[]
  attachments           Attachment[]
  allocationConfirmations AllocationConfirmation[]
  allocationOverrides   AllocationTemplateOverride[]
  cryptoDetail          CryptoTransactionDetail?
}

// ============================================
// ② InvoiceGroup（請求グループ）
// ============================================

model InvoiceGroup {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  counterpartyId        Int       // FK → Counterparty（請求先の取引先）
  operatingCompanyId    Int       // FK → OperatingCompany（請求元法人）
  bankAccountId         Int?      // FK → OperatingCompanyBankAccount（振込先口座）

  invoiceNumber         String?   @unique // 請求書番号（例: STE-INV-202603-0001）
  invoiceDate           DateTime? // 請求日
  paymentDueDate        DateTime? // 支払期限（＝入金予定日）

  subtotal              Int?      // 小計（税抜、自動計算）
  taxAmount             Int?      // 消費税額（小計から一括計算）
  totalAmount           Int?      // 合計（税込、自動計算）

  pdfPath               String?   // 生成済みPDFのファイルパス
  pdfFileName           String?   // PDFファイル名

  // 訂正請求書
  originalInvoiceGroupId Int?     // FK → InvoiceGroup（訂正元）
  correctionType        String?   // "replacement" | "additional"（差し替え/追加請求）

  status                String    @default("draft")
  // "draft" | "pdf_created" | "sent" | "awaiting_accounting" |
  // "partially_paid" | "paid" | "returned" | "corrected"

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  counterparty          Counterparty          @relation(fields: [counterpartyId], references: [id])
  operatingCompany      OperatingCompany      @relation(fields: [operatingCompanyId], references: [id])
  bankAccount           OperatingCompanyBankAccount? @relation(fields: [bankAccountId], references: [id])
  originalInvoiceGroup  InvoiceGroup?         @relation("InvoiceCorrection", fields: [originalInvoiceGroupId], references: [id])
  correctedInvoiceGroups InvoiceGroup[]       @relation("InvoiceCorrection")
  transactions          Transaction[]
  journalEntries        JournalEntry[]
  invoiceMails          InvoiceMail[]
  comments              TransactionComment[]
  attachments           Attachment[]
  projectId             Int?
  project               MasterProject?        @relation("ProjectInvoiceGroups", fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff           @relation("InvoiceGroupCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?          @relation("InvoiceGroupUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ③ PaymentGroup（支払グループ）
// ============================================

model PaymentGroup {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  counterpartyId        Int       // FK → Counterparty（支払先）
  operatingCompanyId    Int       // FK → OperatingCompany（支払元法人）
  targetMonth           DateTime  // 対象月（YYYY-MM-01）

  expectedPaymentDate   DateTime? // 支払予定日
  actualPaymentDate     DateTime? // 実際の支払日
  totalAmount           Int?      // 合計金額
  taxAmount             Int?      // 税額

  // 請求書発行依頼
  requestedPdfName      String?   // 相手に指定するPDFファイル名
  receivedPdfPath       String?   // 受領した請求書PDFのパス
  receivedPdfFileName   String?   // 受領したPDFのファイル名

  status                String    @default("before_request")
  // "before_request" | "requested" | "invoice_received" |
  // "rejected" | "re_requested" | "confirmed" | "paid"

  confirmedBy           Int?      // FK → MasterStaff（請求書確認者）
  confirmedAt           DateTime?

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  counterparty          Counterparty      @relation(fields: [counterpartyId], references: [id])
  operatingCompany      OperatingCompany  @relation(fields: [operatingCompanyId], references: [id])
  transactions          Transaction[]
  journalEntries        JournalEntry[]
  invoiceMails          InvoiceMail[]
  comments              TransactionComment[]
  attachments           Attachment[]
  confirmer             MasterStaff?      @relation("PaymentGroupConfirmer", fields: [confirmedBy], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff       @relation("PaymentGroupCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?      @relation("PaymentGroupUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ④ RecurringTransaction（定期取引）
// ============================================

model RecurringTransaction {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  counterpartyId        Int       // FK → Counterparty
  expenseCategoryId     Int       // FK → ExpenseCategory（費目）
  costCenterId          Int?      // FK → CostCenter（按分なしの場合のプロジェクト）
  allocationTemplateId  Int?      // FK → AllocationTemplate（按分ありの場合）
  paymentMethodId       Int?      // FK → PaymentMethod（決済手段）
  projectId             Int?      // FK → MasterProject（どのプロジェクトで使用するか）

  type                  String    // "revenue" | "expense"
  name                  String    // 名称（例: AWS利用料、オフィス家賃）
  amount                Int?      // 金額（変動の場合はnull）
  taxAmount             Int?      // 消費税額
  taxRate               Int       @default(10) // 税率（%）
  amountType            String    @default("fixed") // "fixed" | "variable"
  frequency             String    // "monthly" | "yearly" | "weekly"
  executionDay          Int?      // monthly: 日付(1-31), yearly: 日付(1-31), weekly: 曜日(0=日,1=月,...,6=土)
  startDate             DateTime  // 開始日
  endDate               DateTime? // 終了日（null=継続中）
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)
  note                  String?   // 摘要・メモ

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  counterparty          Counterparty         @relation(fields: [counterpartyId], references: [id])
  expenseCategory       ExpenseCategory      @relation(fields: [expenseCategoryId], references: [id])
  costCenter            CostCenter?          @relation(fields: [costCenterId], references: [id])
  allocationTemplate    AllocationTemplate?  @relation(fields: [allocationTemplateId], references: [id])
  paymentMethod         PaymentMethod?       @relation(fields: [paymentMethodId], references: [id])
  project               MasterProject?       @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  transactions          Transaction[]
  creator               MasterStaff          @relation("RecurringCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?         @relation("RecurringUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑤ CostCenter（按分先マスタ）
// ============================================

model CostCenter {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  name                  String    // 名称（例: STP事業、社内開発、管理部門）
  projectId             Int?      // FK → MasterProject（CRMプロジェクトと紐づく場合）
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  project               MasterProject?  @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  projectAssignments    CostCenterProjectAssignment[]
  transactions          Transaction[]
  recurringTransactions RecurringTransaction[]
  allocationTemplateLines AllocationTemplateLine[]
  allocationConfirmations AllocationConfirmation[]
  budgets               Budget[]
  creator               MasterStaff?    @relation("CostCenterCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?    @relation("CostCenterUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
  systemProjectBindings SystemProjectBinding[]
}

// ============================================
// ⑤-b CostCenterProjectAssignment（経理プロジェクト↔CRMプロジェクト中間テーブル）
// ============================================

model CostCenterProjectAssignment {
  id            Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  costCenterId  Int
  projectId     Int
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())

  costCenter    CostCenter    @relation(fields: [costCenterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  project       MasterProject @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([costCenterId, projectId])
  @@map("cost_center_project_assignments")
}

// ============================================
// ⑥ AllocationTemplate（按分テンプレート）
// ============================================

model AllocationTemplate {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  name                  String    // 名称（例: 外注Xさん、オフィス家賃）
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  lines                 AllocationTemplateLine[]
  transactions          Transaction[]
  recurringTransactions RecurringTransaction[]
  overrides             AllocationTemplateOverride[]
  creator               MasterStaff   @relation("AllocTemplateCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?  @relation("AllocTemplateUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑦ AllocationTemplateLine（按分テンプレート明細）
// ============================================

model AllocationTemplateLine {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  templateId            Int       // FK → AllocationTemplate
  costCenterId          Int?      // FK → CostCenter（null = 未確定枠）
  allocationRate        Decimal   // 按分率（%）。全明細の合計が100になること
  label                 String?   // 表示ラベル（「未確定」等）

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  template              AllocationTemplate @relation(fields: [templateId], references: [id])
  costCenter            CostCenter?        @relation(fields: [costCenterId], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff?       @relation("AllocLineCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?       @relation("AllocLineUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑧ AllocationConfirmation（按分確定）
// ============================================

model AllocationConfirmation {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  transactionId         Int       // FK → Transaction
  costCenterId          Int       // FK → CostCenter
  confirmedBy           Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  confirmedAt           DateTime?

  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  transaction           Transaction  @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  costCenter            CostCenter   @relation(fields: [costCenterId], references: [id])
  confirmer             MasterStaff? @relation(fields: [confirmedBy], references: [id])

  @@unique([transactionId, costCenterId])
}

// ============================================
// ⑨ AllocationTemplateOverride（按分テンプレート変更時の個別適用記録）
// ============================================

model AllocationTemplateOverride {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  transactionId         Int       // FK → Transaction
  allocationTemplateId  Int       // FK → AllocationTemplate
  snapshotRates         Json      // 変更前の按分率スナップショット [{"costCenterId": 1, "rate": 50}, ...]
  reason                String?   // 維持理由（任意）

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  transaction           Transaction        @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  allocationTemplate    AllocationTemplate @relation(fields: [allocationTemplateId], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff        @relation("AllocOverrideCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])

  @@unique([transactionId, allocationTemplateId])
}

// ============================================
// ⑩ ExpenseCategory（費目マスタ）
// ============================================

model ExpenseCategory {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  name                  String    // 名称（外注費、サブスク費、家賃等）
  type                  String    // "revenue" | "expense" | "both"
  defaultAccountId      Int?      // FK → Account（デフォルト勘定科目）
  displayOrder          Int       @default(0)
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  defaultAccount        Account?              @relation(fields: [defaultAccountId], references: [id])
  transactions          Transaction[]
  recurringTransactions RecurringTransaction[]
  autoJournalRules      AutoJournalRule[]
  creator               MasterStaff?          @relation("ExpCatCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?          @relation("ExpCatUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑪ JournalEntry（仕訳）
// ============================================

model JournalEntry {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  invoiceGroupId        Int?      // FK → InvoiceGroup（売上側：請求グループ単位で紐づく）
  paymentGroupId        Int?      // FK → PaymentGroup（経費側：支払グループ単位で紐づく）
  transactionId         Int?      // FK → Transaction（個別取引に直接紐づく場合）
  journalDate           DateTime  // 仕訳日
  description           String    // 摘要

  isAutoGenerated       Boolean   @default(false) // 自動生成フラグ
  status                String    @default("draft") // "draft" | "confirmed"
  autoJournalRuleId     Int?      // FK → AutoJournalRule（どのルールで生成されたか）

  approvedBy            Int?      // FK → MasterStaff（確定者）
  approvedAt            DateTime?

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  invoiceGroup          InvoiceGroup?    @relation(fields: [invoiceGroupId], references: [id])
  paymentGroup          PaymentGroup?    @relation(fields: [paymentGroupId], references: [id])
  transaction           Transaction?     @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  autoJournalRule       AutoJournalRule? @relation(fields: [autoJournalRuleId], references: [id])
  lines                 JournalEntryLine[]
  reconciliations       Reconciliation[]
  attachments           Attachment[]
  approver              MasterStaff?     @relation("JournalApprover", fields: [approvedBy], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff      @relation("JournalCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?     @relation("JournalUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑫ JournalEntryLine（仕訳明細）
// ============================================

model JournalEntryLine {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  journalEntryId        Int       // FK → JournalEntry
  side                  String    // "debit" | "credit"（借方/貸方）
  accountId             Int       // FK → Account（勘定科目）
  amount                Int       // 金額
  description           String?   // 明細摘要（任意）

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  journalEntry          JournalEntry @relation(fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  account               Account      @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff? @relation("JournalLineCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff? @relation("JournalLineUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑬ Account（勘定科目）
// ============================================

model Account {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  code                  String    @unique // 科目コード（例: "1100"）
  name                  String    // 科目名（例: 売掛金）
  category              String    // "asset" | "liability" | "revenue" | "expense"
  displayOrder          Int       @default(0)
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  journalEntryLines     JournalEntryLine[]
  expenseCategories     ExpenseCategory[]
  debitRules            AutoJournalRule[]   @relation("DebitAccount")
  creditRules           AutoJournalRule[]   @relation("CreditAccount")
  budgets               Budget[]
  creator               MasterStaff?        @relation("AccountCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?        @relation("AccountUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑭ BankTransaction（入出金）
// ============================================

model BankTransaction {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  transactionDate       DateTime  // 日付
  direction             String    // "incoming" | "outgoing"（入金/出金）
  paymentMethodId       Int       // FK → PaymentMethod（決済手段）
  counterpartyId        Int?      // FK → Counterparty（取引先）
  amount                Int       // 金額
  description           String?   // 摘要
  source                String    @default("manual") // "manual" | "legacy" | "csv_import"（データ元識別）

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  paymentMethod         PaymentMethod    @relation(fields: [paymentMethodId], references: [id])
  counterparty          Counterparty?    @relation(fields: [counterpartyId], references: [id])
  reconciliations       Reconciliation[]
  attachments           Attachment[]
  cryptoDetail          CryptoTransactionDetail?
  creator               MasterStaff      @relation("BankTxCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?     @relation("BankTxUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑮ Reconciliation（消込）
// ============================================

model Reconciliation {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  journalEntryId        Int       // FK → JournalEntry
  bankTransactionId     Int       // FK → BankTransaction
  amount                Int       // 消込金額

  performedBy           Int       // FK → MasterStaff（消込実行者）
  performedAt           DateTime  @default(now())

  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  journalEntry          JournalEntry    @relation(fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  bankTransaction       BankTransaction @relation(fields: [bankTransactionId], references: [id])
  performer             MasterStaff     @relation("ReconciliationPerformer", fields: [performedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑯ Counterparty（取引先マスタ）
// ============================================

model Counterparty {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  displayId             String?   @unique // "SC-1"（Stella顧客）or "TP-1"（その他）
  name                  String    // 名称
  companyId             Int?      // FK → MasterStellaCompany（Stella顧客と紐づく場合）
  counterpartyType      String    @default("other")
  // "customer" | "vendor" | "service" | "other"
  memo                  String?
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)

  // 統合管理
  mergedIntoId          Int?      // FK → Counterparty（統合先）
  mergedAt              DateTime?

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  company               MasterStellaCompany? @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  mergedInto            Counterparty?        @relation("CounterpartyMerge", fields: [mergedIntoId], references: [id])
  mergedFrom            Counterparty[]       @relation("CounterpartyMerge")
  transactions          Transaction[]
  recurringTransactions RecurringTransaction[]
  bankTransactions      BankTransaction[]
  autoJournalRules      AutoJournalRule[]
  invoiceGroups         InvoiceGroup[]
  paymentGroups         PaymentGroup[]
  creator               MasterStaff?         @relation("CounterpartyCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?         @relation("CounterpartyUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑰ AutoJournalRule（自動仕訳ルール）
// ============================================

model AutoJournalRule {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  counterpartyId        Int?      // FK → Counterparty（null = 全取引先）
  transactionType       String?   // "revenue" | "expense"（null = 両方）
  expenseCategoryId     Int?      // FK → ExpenseCategory（null = 全費目）
  debitAccountId        Int       // FK → Account（借方科目）
  creditAccountId       Int       // FK → Account（貸方科目）
  priority              Int       @default(100) // 優先度（小さいほど高い）
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  counterparty          Counterparty?   @relation(fields: [counterpartyId], references: [id])
  expenseCategory       ExpenseCategory? @relation(fields: [expenseCategoryId], references: [id])
  debitAccount          Account         @relation("DebitAccount", fields: [debitAccountId], references: [id])
  creditAccount         Account         @relation("CreditAccount", fields: [creditAccountId], references: [id])
  journalEntries        JournalEntry[]
  creator               MasterStaff     @relation("AutoJournalCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?    @relation("AutoJournalUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑱ PaymentMethod（決済手段マスタ）
// ============================================

model PaymentMethod {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  methodType            String    // "cash" | "bank_account" | "credit_card" | "crypto_wallet"
  name                  String    // 名称（例: 三菱UFJ普通、会社用VISA）
  details               Json?     // 種別ごとの詳細情報

  // 残高管理
  initialBalance        Int?      // 初期残高
  initialBalanceDate    DateTime? // 初期残高日

  // 残高アラート
  balanceAlertThreshold Int?      // 残高アラート閾値

  // クレカ専用
  closingDay            Int?      // 締め日
  paymentDay            Int?      // 引落日
  settlementAccountId   Int?      // FK → PaymentMethod（引落口座）

  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  settlementAccount     PaymentMethod?            @relation("CreditCardSettlement", fields: [settlementAccountId], references: [id])
  creditCards           PaymentMethod[]            @relation("CreditCardSettlement")
  bankTransactions      BankTransaction[]
  transactions          Transaction[]
  recurringTransactions RecurringTransaction[]
  cryptoDetails         CryptoTransactionDetail[]
  bankAccounts          OperatingCompanyBankAccount[]
  creator               MasterStaff?              @relation("PayMethodCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?              @relation("PayMethodUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑲ Attachment（証憑）
// ============================================

model Attachment {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  transactionId         Int?      // FK → Transaction
  journalEntryId        Int?      // FK → JournalEntry
  bankTransactionId     Int?      // FK → BankTransaction
  commentId             Int?      // FK → TransactionComment（コメント返信時の添付）
  invoiceGroupId        Int?      // FK → InvoiceGroup（請求添付ファイル）
  paymentGroupId        Int?      // FK → PaymentGroup（支払添付ファイル）

  fileName              String
  filePath              String    // ストレージパス
  fileSize              Int?      // バイト数
  mimeType              String?
  attachmentType        String    @default("other")
  // "receipt" | "invoice" | "contract" | "other"

  uploadedBy            Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  transaction           Transaction?        @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  journalEntry          JournalEntry?       @relation(fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  bankTransaction       BankTransaction?    @relation(fields: [bankTransactionId], references: [id])
  comment               TransactionComment? @relation(fields: [commentId], references: [id])
  invoiceGroup          InvoiceGroup?       @relation(fields: [invoiceGroupId], references: [id])
  paymentGroup          PaymentGroup?       @relation(fields: [paymentGroupId], references: [id])
  uploader              MasterStaff         @relation("AttachmentUploader", fields: [uploadedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ⑳ CryptoTransactionDetail（仮想通貨取引詳細）
// ============================================

model CryptoTransactionDetail {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  transactionId         Int?      @unique // FK → Transaction
  bankTransactionId     Int?      @unique // FK → BankTransaction
  currency              String    // 銘柄（USDT、BTC、ETH等）
  network               String    // ネットワーク（TRC20、ERC20等）
  counterpartyWallet    String?   // 取引先Walletアドレス
  ownWallet             String?   // 自社Walletアドレス
  foreignAmount         Decimal   // 外貨金額
  foreignCurrency       String    // 外貨単位（USD等）
  exchangeRate          Decimal   // レート
  paymentMethodId       Int?      // FK → PaymentMethod

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  transaction           Transaction?    @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  bankTransaction       BankTransaction? @relation(fields: [bankTransactionId], references: [id])
  paymentMethod         PaymentMethod?  @relation(fields: [paymentMethodId], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff?    @relation("CryptoDetailCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?    @relation("CryptoDetailUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ㉑ SystemSetting（システム設定）
// ============================================

model SystemSetting {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  category              String    // "crypto_currency" | "crypto_network" 等
  value                 String    // 選択肢の値（"USDT", "BTC", "TRC20" 等）
  label                 String?   // 表示ラベル（null の場合は value をそのまま表示）
  displayOrder          Int       @default(0)
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  creator               MasterStaff? @relation("SystemSettingCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff? @relation("SystemSettingUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])

  @@unique([category, value])
}

// ============================================
// ㉒ Budget（予算）
// ============================================

model Budget {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  costCenterId          Int?      // FK → CostCenter（null = 全社）
  accountId             Int?      // FK → Account（紐づく勘定科目）
  categoryLabel         String    // 予算カテゴリラベル（売上、外注費、家賃等）
  targetMonth           DateTime  // 対象月（YYYY-MM-01）
  budgetAmount          Int       // 予算額
  memo                  String?

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  costCenter            CostCenter? @relation(fields: [costCenterId], references: [id])
  account               Account?    @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff @relation("BudgetCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff? @relation("BudgetUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ㉓ MonthlyCloseLog（月次クローズ履歴）
// ============================================

model MonthlyCloseLog {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  projectId             Int?      // FK → MasterProject（null = 全社クローズ）
  targetMonth           DateTime  // 対象月（YYYY-MM-01）
  action                String    // "close" | "reopen"
  reason                String?   // 再オープン時の理由（必須）
  snapshotData          Json?     // クローズ時のPLスナップショット（closeの場合）

  performedBy           Int       // FK → MasterStaff（経理管理者）
  performedAt           DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  project               MasterProject? @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  performer             MasterStaff    @relation("MonthlyClosePerformer", fields: [performedBy], references: [id])

  @@index([targetMonth])
  @@index([projectId, targetMonth])
}

// ============================================
// ㉔ OperatingCompanyEmail（運営法人メールアドレス）
// ============================================

model OperatingCompanyEmail {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  operatingCompanyId    Int       // FK → OperatingCompany
  email                 String
  label                 String?   // 用途（例: 請求書送付用、一般問い合わせ用）
  smtpHost              String?   // 法人ごとのSMTP設定（null=システム共通設定を使用）
  smtpPort              Int?
  smtpUser              String?
  smtpPass              String?
  isDefault             Boolean   @default(false)
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  createdBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  operatingCompany      OperatingCompany @relation(fields: [operatingCompanyId], references: [id])
  invoiceMails          InvoiceMail[]
  creator               MasterStaff?     @relation("OpCoEmailCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?     @relation("OpCoEmailUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ㉕ InvoiceTemplate（請求書テンプレート）
// ============================================

model InvoiceTemplate {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  operatingCompanyId    Int       // FK → OperatingCompany
  name                  String    // テンプレート名
  templateType          String    // "sending" | "request"（送付用/発行依頼用）
  emailSubjectTemplate  String    // メール件名テンプレート
  emailBodyTemplate     String    // メール本文テンプレート（テンプレート変数使用可）
  isDefault             Boolean   @default(false)

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  operatingCompany      OperatingCompany @relation(fields: [operatingCompanyId], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff      @relation("InvoiceTemplateCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?     @relation("InvoiceTemplateUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ㉖ InvoiceMail（請求書送信履歴）
// ============================================

model InvoiceMail {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  invoiceGroupId        Int?      // FK → InvoiceGroup（請求書送付の場合）
  paymentGroupId        Int?      // FK → PaymentGroup（発行依頼の場合）
  operatingCompanyId    Int       // FK → OperatingCompany
  senderEmailId         Int?      // FK → OperatingCompanyEmail

  sendMethod            String    // "email" | "line" | "postal" | "other"
  subject               String?   // 件名（メール以外はnull可）
  body                  String?   // 本文
  pdfPath               String?   // 添付PDFのパス

  status                String    @default("draft")
  // "draft" | "sent" | "failed"
  sentBy                Int?      // FK → MasterStaff（送信実行者）
  sentAt                DateTime? // 送信日時
  errorMessage          String?   // 送信失敗時のエラー内容

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff（下書き作成者）
  updatedBy             Int?      // FK → MasterStaff（最終更新者）
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  invoiceGroup          InvoiceGroup?        @relation(fields: [invoiceGroupId], references: [id])
  paymentGroup          PaymentGroup?        @relation(fields: [paymentGroupId], references: [id])
  operatingCompany      OperatingCompany     @relation(fields: [operatingCompanyId], references: [id])
  senderEmail           OperatingCompanyEmail? @relation(fields: [senderEmailId], references: [id])
  recipients            InvoiceMailRecipient[]
  sender                MasterStaff?         @relation("InvoiceMailSender", fields: [sentBy], references: [id])
  creator               MasterStaff          @relation("InvoiceMailCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
  updater               MasterStaff?         @relation("InvoiceMailUpdater", fields: [updatedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ㉗ InvoiceMailRecipient（請求書送信先）
// ============================================

model InvoiceMailRecipient {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  invoiceMailId         Int       // FK → InvoiceMail
  contactId             Int?      // FK → StellaCompanyContact（既存担当者から選んだ場合）
  name                  String?   // 手動入力の場合の名前
  email                 String    // メールアドレス
  recipientType         String    // "to" | "cc" | "bcc"

  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  invoiceMail           InvoiceMail          @relation(fields: [invoiceMailId], references: [id])
  contact               StellaCompanyContact? @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ㉘ TransactionComment（取引コメント）
// ============================================

model TransactionComment {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  transactionId         Int?      // FK → Transaction
  invoiceGroupId        Int?      // FK → InvoiceGroup
  paymentGroupId        Int?      // FK → PaymentGroup
  parentId              Int?      // FK → TransactionComment（スレッド返信の場合、親コメントID）

  body                  String    // コメント本文
  commentType           String    @default("normal")
  // "normal" | "return" | "approval" | "question"
  returnReasonType      String?   // 差し戻し時の種別: "question" | "correction_request" | "approval_check" | "other"

  createdBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  // Relations
  transaction           Transaction?       @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  invoiceGroup          InvoiceGroup?      @relation(fields: [invoiceGroupId], references: [id])
  paymentGroup          PaymentGroup?      @relation(fields: [paymentGroupId], references: [id])
  parent                TransactionComment? @relation("CommentThread", fields: [parentId], references: [id])
  replies               TransactionComment[] @relation("CommentThread")
  attachments           Attachment[]
  creator               MasterStaff        @relation("CommentCreator", fields: [createdBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ㉙ Notification（通知）
// ============================================

model Notification {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  recipientId           Int       // FK → MasterStaff（宛先）
  senderType            String    // "system" | "staff"
  senderId              Int?      // FK → MasterStaff（スタッフからの通知の場合）
  category              String    // "finance" | "accounting" | "kpi" | "system" | "other"
  title                 String
  message               String
  linkUrl               String?   // 関連ページへのリンク

  status                String    @default("unread")
  // "unread" | "read" | "in_progress" | "completed"
  statusChangedAt       DateTime?
  statusChangedBy       Int?      // FK → MasterStaff

  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  recipient             MasterStaff  @relation("NotificationRecipient", fields: [recipientId], references: [id])
  sender                MasterStaff? @relation("NotificationSender", fields: [senderId], references: [id])
  statusChanger         MasterStaff? @relation("NotificationStatusChanger", fields: [statusChangedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// ㉚ ChangeLog（変更履歴）
// ============================================

model ChangeLog {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  tableName             String    // テーブル名（例: "Transaction", "JournalEntry"）
  recordId              Int       // 変更されたレコードのID
  changeType            String    // "create" | "update" | "delete"
  oldData               Json?     // 変更前のデータ
  newData               Json?     // 変更後のデータ

  changedBy             Int       // FK → MasterStaff
  changedAt             DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  changer               MasterStaff @relation("ChangeLogChanger", fields: [changedBy], references: [id])
}

// ============================================
// 候補判定（TransactionCandidateDecision）
// ============================================

model TransactionCandidateDecision {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  candidateKey      String    @db.VarChar(200)   // "crm-revenue-initial-123" 等
  targetMonth       String    @db.VarChar(7)     // "2026-03"（YYYY-MM形式、Zodで厳格検証）
  status            String    @default("pending") // pending | converted | held | dismissed
  reasonType        String?   @db.VarChar(50)    // held_price_undecided, dismissed_duplicate, etc.
  memo              String?
  needsReview       Boolean   @default(false)

  // ソース変更検知用フィンガープリント（SHA-256ハッシュ）
  sourceFingerprint String?

  // 変動金額候補用（Phase 3）
  overrideAmount              Int?
  overrideTaxAmount           Int?
  overrideTaxRate             Int?
  overrideMemo                String?
  overrideScheduledPaymentDate DateTime? @db.Date

  decidedBy         Int?      // FK → MasterStaff
  decidedAt         DateTime?
  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  decider           MasterStaff? @relation("CandidateDecisionDecider", fields: [decidedBy], references: [id])

  @@unique([candidateKey, targetMonth])
}

// ============================================
// システムプロジェクトバインディング
// ============================================

model SystemProjectBinding {
  id                    Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  routeKey              String    @unique @db.VarChar(50)  // "stp" 等（immutable）
  projectId             Int
  defaultCostCenterId   Int?
  operatingCompanyId    Int?
  isActive              Boolean   @default(true)
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  project               MasterProject     @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  defaultCostCenter     CostCenter?       @relation(fields: [defaultCostCenterId], references: [id])
  operatingCompany      OperatingCompany? @relation(fields: [operatingCompanyId], references: [id])

  @@map("system_project_bindings")
}

toolUseResult.originalFile:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ============================================
// 全顧客マスタ (Stella Companies)
// ============================================

model MasterStellaCompany {
  id              Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyCode     String   @unique @db.VarChar(20)  // SC-1, SC-2...
  name            String   @db.VarChar(200)         // 企業名
  nameKana        String?  @db.VarChar(200)         // 企業名フリガナ
  corporateNumber String?  @unique @db.VarChar(13)   // 法人番号（13桁）
  companyType     String?  @db.VarChar(10)          // 区分（法人/個人）
  websiteUrl      String?  @db.VarChar(500)         // 企業HP
  industry        String?  @db.VarChar(100)         // 業界（自由入力）
  revenueScale    String?  @db.VarChar(100)         // 売上規模（自由入力）
  staffId         Int?                              // 担当者（AS）
  leadSource      String?  @db.VarChar(50)          // 流入経路（紹介/Web問い合わせ/テレアポ/展示会/セミナー/代理店）
  note            String?                           // メモ

  // 締め日・支払条件
  closingDay             Int?                              // 締め日（0=月末, 1-28=指定日）
  paymentMonthOffset     Int?                              // 支払月（1=翌月, 2=翌々月, 3=3ヶ月後...）
  paymentDay             Int?                              // 支払日（0=末日, 1-28=指定日）

  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt
  deletedAt     DateTime? @map("deleted_at")

  // 企業統合（マージ）
  mergedIntoId  Int?                              // 統合先企業ID（統合済みの場合）
  mergedAt      DateTime?                         // 統合日時

  // Relations
  staff                MasterStaff?         @relation(fields: [staffId], references: [id])
  mergedInto           MasterStellaCompany? @relation("CompanyMerge", fields: [mergedIntoId], references: [id])
  mergedFrom           MasterStellaCompany[] @relation("CompanyMerge")
  locations            StellaCompanyLocation[]
  contacts             StellaCompanyContact[]
  bankAccounts         StellaCompanyBankAccount[]
  stpCompanies         StpCompany[]
  stpContractHistories StpContractHistory[]
  agentCompanies       StpAgent[]           @relation("AgentCompany")
  referredAgents       StpAgent[]           @relation("ReferrerCompany")
  contracts            MasterContract[]
  contactHistories     ContactHistory[]
  externalUsers        ExternalUser[]
  registrationTokens   RegistrationToken[]
  counterparties       Counterparty[]            // 経理システム追加

  @@map("master_stella_companies")
}

// ============================================
// 企業拠点 (Stella Company Locations)
// 本社・支社などの拠点情報
// ============================================

model StellaCompanyLocation {
  id         Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId  Int                                    // MasterStellaCompanyへの外部キー
  name       String    @db.VarChar(100)             // 拠点名（本社、大阪支店など）
  address    String?                                // 住所
  phone      String?   @db.VarChar(50)              // 電話番号
  email      String?   @db.VarChar(255)             // メールアドレス
  isPrimary  Boolean   @default(false)              // 主要拠点フラグ
  note       String?                                // 備考
  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt  DateTime?                              // 論理削除日時

  // Relations
  company MasterStellaCompany @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("stella_company_locations")
}

// ============================================
// 企業担当者 (Stella Company Contacts)
// ============================================

model StellaCompanyContact {
  id         Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId  Int                                    // MasterStellaCompanyへの外部キー
  name       String    @db.VarChar(100)             // 担当者名
  email      String?   @db.VarChar(255)             // メールアドレス
  phone      String?   @db.VarChar(50)              // 電話番号
  department String?   @db.VarChar(100)             // 担当部署
  isPrimary  Boolean   @default(false)              // 主連絡先フラグ
  note       String?                                // 備考
  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt  DateTime?                              // 論理削除日時

  // Relations
  company      MasterStellaCompany @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  externalUser ExternalUser?
  invoiceMailRecipients InvoiceMailRecipient[]  // 経理システム追加

  @@map("stella_company_contacts")
}

// ============================================
// 企業銀行口座 (Stella Company Bank Accounts)
// ============================================

model StellaCompanyBankAccount {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId         Int                                    // MasterStellaCompanyへの外部キー
  bankName          String    @db.VarChar(100)             // 銀行名
  bankCode          String    @db.VarChar(10)              // 銀行コード
  branchName        String    @db.VarChar(100)             // 支店名
  branchCode        String    @db.VarChar(10)              // 支店コード
  accountNumber     String    @db.VarChar(20)              // 口座番号
  accountHolderName String    @db.VarChar(200)             // 口座名義人
  note              String?                                // メモ
  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt         DateTime?                              // 論理削除日時

  // Relations
  company MasterStellaCompany @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("stella_company_bank_accounts")
}

// ============================================
// 代理店マスタ (STP Agents)
// ============================================

model StpAgent {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId         Int                                        // 代理店企業（MasterStellaCompanyへの外部キー）※アプリ層でユニーク制約
  status            String    @db.VarChar(20)                   // アクティブ/非アクティブ/解約
  category1         String    @db.VarChar(20)                   // 代理店/顧問
  contractStatus    String?   @db.VarChar(20)                   // 契約済み/商談済み/未商談/日程調整中
  referrerCompanyId Int?                                        // 紹介者（MasterStellaCompanyへの外部キー）
  note              String?                                     // 代理店メモ
  minimumCases      Int?                                        // 最低件数（顧問のみ）
  agentInitialFee   Int?                                        // 代理店への初期費用
  monthlyFee        Int?                                        // 月額費用
  hearingUrl        String?   @db.VarChar(500)                  // ヒアリングURL

  // 担当事務
  adminStaffId      Int?                                        // 担当事務（Staffから選択）

  // 源泉徴収対応
  isIndividualBusiness Boolean  @default(false)                  // 個人事業主フラグ
  withholdingTaxRate   Decimal? @db.Decimal(5,2)                 // デフォルト源泉徴収税率(%)

  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  company          MasterStellaCompany  @relation("AgentCompany", fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  referrerCompany  MasterStellaCompany? @relation("ReferrerCompany", fields: [referrerCompanyId], references: [id])
  adminStaff       MasterStaff?         @relation("AdminStaffAgents", fields: [adminStaffId], references: [id])
  stpCompanies           StpCompany[]
  contracts              StpAgentContract[]
  staffAssignments       StpAgentStaff[]
  leadFormToken          StpLeadFormToken?
  agentContractHistories StpAgentContractHistory[]
  expenseRecords         StpExpenseRecord[]
  invoices               StpInvoice[]

  @@map("stp_agents")
}

// ============================================
// 代理店契約書 (STP Agent Contracts)
// 将来のクラウドサインAPI連携対応
// ============================================

model StpAgentContract {
  id              Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  agentId         Int
  contractUrl     String                                     // 契約書URL
  signedDate      DateTime? @db.Date                         // 締結日（未締結はnull）
  title           String?   @db.VarChar(200)                 // 契約書タイトル
  externalId      String?   @db.VarChar(100)                 // 外部サービスID（クラウドサイン等）
  externalService String?   @db.VarChar(50)                  // 外部サービス名
  status          String    @default("signed") @db.VarChar(20) // draft/pending/signed/expired
  note            String?
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt

  agent StpAgent @relation(fields: [agentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("stp_agent_contracts")
}

// ============================================
// 代理店担当者 (STP Agent Staff)
// 担当者の複数選択用中間テーブル
// ============================================
